    C

    calculateMove(ImaginativePlayer, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Calculates the optimal move for a player based on a specific difficulty strategy.
    calculateMove(ImaginativePlayer, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.EasyDifficulty
     
    calculateMove(ImaginativePlayer, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.HardDifficulty
     
    calculateMove(ImaginativePlayer, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.MediumDifficulty
     
    calculateRemoval(ImaginativePlayer, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Determines the node from which a stone should be removed as part of the strategy.
    calculateRemoval(ImaginativePlayer, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.EasyDifficulty
     
    calculateRemoval(ImaginativePlayer, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.HardDifficulty
     
    calculateRemoval(ImaginativePlayer, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.MediumDifficulty
     
    cardLayout - Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    cardPanel - Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    checkGeneralErrors(PlayerEntity, Node, Node) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
    Helper method for RuleManager.isMoveValid(PlayerEntity, Node, Node) method.
    checkSpecificErrors(PlayerEntity, Node, Node) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
    Helper method for RuleManager.isMoveValid(PlayerEntity, Node, Node) method.
    clearRedo() - Methode in Klasse persistance.History
    Clears the redo stack by removing every element.
    clusterMove(List<Node[]>, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Identifies a potential move for clustering stones based on the player's strategy.
    connectNodes(Map<Integer, Node>, int, int) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Connects two nodes on the board by adding each Node to the other's list of neighbors.
    copyBoard(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Creates a deep copy of the current game board and reconnects the copied nodes based on the neighbor structure.
    countMillsFormed(Node[], PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
    This method is specifically used to identify mills formed for planning a move by the CPU.
    countMillsFormed(Stone) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
    Counts the new mills formed with the newly placed or moved stone.
    CPUPlayer - Klasse in players
    Represents a CPU player in the game, which operates based on a specific strategy.
    CPUPlayer(String, PlayerEntity) - Konstruktor für Klasse players.CPUPlayer
    Constructs a CPU player with the specified name and an opposing player.
    createBoardPanel() - Statische Methode in Klasse view.BoardScreenPanel
    Helper method for the BoardScreenPanel.createBoardScreen(CardLayout, JPanel, String, DifficultyStrategy) method.
    createBoardScreen(CardLayout, JPanel, String, DifficultyStrategy) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.BoardScreenPanel
    Creates the Board Screen JPanel
    createBoardSnapshot(Map<Integer, Node>) - Methode in Klasse persistance.GamePersistenceManager
    Helpermethod for GamePersistenceManager.toMoveData(Move).
    createButtonPanel(CardLayout, JPanel) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.BoardScreenPanel
    Helper method for the BoardScreenPanel.createBoardScreen(CardLayout, JPanel, String, DifficultyStrategy) method.
    createButtonPanel(CardLayout, JPanel) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.DifficultyScreenPanel
    Helper method for DifficultyScreenPanel.createDifficultyScreen(CardLayout, JPanel) method.
    createButtonPanel(CardLayout, JPanel) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.NewGameScreenPanel
    Creates a button panel with buttons for singleplayer, multiplayer, and back to the main menu.
    createCreditsMenu(JFrame) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.MenuBar
    Creates the "Credits" menu which displays information about the contributors to the project when clicked.
    createDifficultyScreen(CardLayout, JPanel) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.DifficultyScreenPanel
    Creates the Difficulty Screen JPanel.
    createGameState(PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity, History, int, int, int, String) - Methode in Klasse persistance.GamePersistenceManager
    Creates a GameStateData object containing all necessary information to restore the current game state.
    createHelpMenu(JFrame) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.MenuBar
    Creates the "Help" menu of the application, which contains items providing information or assistance, such as the game rules.
    createHomeImage() - Statische Methode in Klasse view.HomeScreenPanel
    Creates a specific image which is shown on multiple Screens.
    createHomeLogo() - Statische Methode in Klasse view.HomeScreenPanel
    Creates a specific logo which is shown on multiple Screens.
    createHomeScreen(CardLayout, JPanel) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.HomeScreenPanel
    Creates the Home Screen JPanel.
    createMenuScreen(CardLayout, JPanel) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.MenuScreenPanel
    Creates the Menu Screen JPanel
    createNewGameScreen(CardLayout, JPanel) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.NewGameScreenPanel
    Creates the New Game Screen JPanel.
    createSliderPanel(String, DifficultyStrategy) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.BoardScreenPanel
    Helper method for the BoardScreenPanel.createTopPanel(String, DifficultyStrategy) method.
    createStartButton(String, DifficultyStrategy) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.BoardScreenPanel
    Helper method for the BoardScreenPanel.createSliderPanel(String, DifficultyStrategy) method.
    createTimePromptPanel() - Statische Methode in Klasse view.BoardScreenPanel
    Helper method for the BoardScreenPanel.createTopPanel(String, DifficultyStrategy) method.
    createTopPanel(String, DifficultyStrategy) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.BoardScreenPanel
    Helper method for the BoardScreenPanel.createBoardScreen(CardLayout, JPanel, String, DifficultyStrategy) method.
